# Raga Yaman

Raga Yaman is a Hindustani classical raga.

## Origin and History

Yaman is believed to have originated in the Kalyan thaat. It is closely related to
the Lydian mode in Western music. See [[raga-yaman.json]] for a visual overview.

## Scale Structure

The raga uses all shuddha (natural) notes plus a tivra (sharp) Ma.
This gives it a distinctive bright and open character.
